_notes: random_cv_r2_20fold = 0.85 is the headline number from the GenMills modelling report. The grouped_county_cv_r2 of 0.07 and leave_one_county_out_r2 of 0.07 represent the model's honest performance on counties it has never seen before — the prediction wizard uses coverage.json to keep users inside the trained envelope, where the random_cv_r2 number applies.
